response.name: The Aperture Room
response.description_base: A high-ceilinged stone room deeper in the courthouse, behind the holding cells. The aperture: a column of white light pulses upward from the floor through a hole in the roof, oriented to the sky. This is the gateway — where Lattice energy is shipped outward, and through which the Returned descend. Stone benches around the perimeter. Blank walls. The shielding makes the room silent except for the aperture's faint hum (its own signal, distinct from the Lattice hum).
response.exterior_view: A hallway leading deeper in. The end of the hallway is filled with a column of white light pulsing skyward.

mandatory_renders.name: The Aperture (Lagota Gateway)
mandatory_renders.description: A column of white light pulsing upward from the floor through a hole in the roof of the gateway building (the building the second gate is built around). The aperture is the empire's imperial-energy export terminus for this node. Lattice energy is shipped outward through this column. Returned beings drop through it inbound. Visible from outside Lagota as a pulse of light against the sky.

out.exterior_view: Back toward the cells and the nave.

up_via_aperture.exterior_view: The aperture is the only way 'up' from this room. Where it leads is not canonized — the empire's destination for harvested Lattice energy. Possibly another node. Possibly the spirit realm.

from_aperture_inbound.exterior_view: Returned arrive through the aperture, dropping through the column of light. Inbound only — beings cannot return through the column to wherever they came from.

npcs_present.name: Aperture Guard Golems (class)
npcs_present.appearance_static: Seven feet. Stone. Blue eyes. Halberds. Stand at attention near the entrance to the aperture room.

response.active_state_text: The aperture pulses steadily, white light rising from the floor through the hole in the roof. The room is otherwise empty. The hum is local, oriented to the column. Two guard golems stand near the entrance.

forbidden_topics.topic: attempt to enter the aperture's light column physically
forbidden_topics.consequence: The light pulses. The protagonist is launched upward. Where they arrive is not canonized — they leave Lagota. The empire's gateway is not designed for living transit. The protagonist may arrive in another node, another part of the spirit realm, or be lost. Flag for canonizer.

The aperture is part of the Lattice infrastructure, not a discrete object. Attacks have no obvious effect. The aperture's pulse continues. The hum thickens. Within one time_passes interval, guards arrive in significant number.

time_passes_override.default_outcome_prose: Time in the aperture room passes literally. The aperture pulses on its own rhythm — cargo transfers happen on a schedule the empire manages. Returned arrivals are unscheduled from the protagonist's perspective but follow imperial logistics. The shielding makes the room silent except for the aperture's own hum.
